Market Sentiment Tracker

Check out how the US markets are feeling about equities at a glance

📊 Quick Guide for New Investors

😨

Fear (0-35)

When investors are scared, prices often drop. This can be a good time to buy quality stocks at lower prices.

😐

Neutral (35-65)

Balanced market sentiment. Prices are typically stable with normal trading activity.

🤑

Greed (65-100)

When investors get too excited, prices may be inflated. Consider taking profits or being more cautious.

Time Frames: 1D = today's mood, 5D = this week's trend, 1M = monthly sentiment

Market sentiment analysis • Last updated: --

Important: This tool shows market sentiment and trends but is not financial advice. Always do your own research and consider consulting a financial advisor before making investment decisions.

How to use: Green gauges = positive sentiment, Red gauges = negative sentiment. Use timeframe buttons (1D, 5D, 1M) to see different time periods.
